meta.name: PRSM EMERGENCY: Pause EmissionController minting
meta.description: Halts all `mintAuthorized` calls from EmissionController. Vested grants and existing balances unaffected; ONLY new emissions are blocked. USE FOR: halving-bug detection, emission rate anomaly, spurious mint authorization, EmissionController contract bug post-Phase 8. Note: function gated by `onlyOwner`, NOT a role — Owner is the foundation governance multi-sig (4-of-5 threshold per Q6 ratification). Does not unwind existing mint history; resume continues from lastMintTimestamp.
